subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: governance/rights/economics rebuilt from independent sources (IMF/EIU/ECLAC estimates, V-Dem, RSF, Freedom House, HRW, Amnesty, CPJ, WOLA) + independent/exile press (14ymedio, Diario de Cuba, El Toque); Cuban state media and official statistics EXCLUDED there - even headline GDP/population rest on independent estimates.
A one-party communist state in deep economic collapse: a botched currency unification, mass emigration, chronic blackouts, and a degraded once-vaunted health system.
Standout drags: economic collapse, a closed autocracy, a demographic crisis, and collapsing infrastructure under the US embargo. Overall: clearly negative.

economic.notes: A collapsed, defaulted, embargo-constrained economy with a botched currency and high inflation.

fiscal_state.notes: Collapsed and opaque, in default to creditors and embargo-constrained, with a large cumulative GDP loss since 2019. (EIU; Columbia Horizonte Cubano)

monetary_independence.notes: No central-bank independence; a botched 2021 unification left the peso collapsed with a wide official/street gap. (El Toque)

inflation.notes: Very high and dollarization-driven, with official figures understating it. (Havana Times)

banking_stability.notes: Broken and cash/dollar-rationed amid an FX shortage. (El Toque)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: Tourism crashed, plus nickel/medical-services exports and remittances; embargo-constrained and import-dependent in a food-and-fuel crisis. (EIU)

institutional.notes: A closed autocracy with no rule of law, unusable data, and among the worst press repression.

rule_of_law.notes: A one-party communist state with no judicial independence - a closed autocracy. (V-Dem 2026; Freedom House)

statistical_integrity.notes: Opaque and unusable, with disputed population figures. (Columbia)

civil_service_capacity.notes: Historically capable but resource-starved and hollowing via emigration. (independent analysis)

press_freedom.notes: Among the worst in the Americas - a near-bottom RSF standing, with journalists jailed or exiled. (RSF; CPJ)

political_social.notes: Entrenched one-party rule under collapse pressure, severe repression, and a demographic crisis.

political_stability.notes: Entrenched post-Castro rule, suppressed but pressured by collapse, the 2021 protests, and blackout-driven unrest. (HRW; Freedom House)

civil_liberties.notes: Severe repression, with hundreds of 2021 protesters still imprisoned. (HRW; Amnesty)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: Not a destination and with no real residency pathway. (observed)

social_cohesion.notes: The young drained out, with chronic blackouts, shortages, and despair. (independent analysis)

demographics.notes: A demographic crisis - among the fastest-ageing, with a mass exodus (over a million since 2021, mostly working-age). (U.Navarra; CEDA)

geopolitical.notes: Isolated and embargoed, relisted as a US state-sponsor of terrorism.

alliance_reliability.notes: Isolated and Russia/China/Venezuela-leaning, relisted as a US state-sponsor of terrorism. (State Dept)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: The decades-long US embargo plus the terrorism listing and heavy controls. (WOLA; OHCHR)

physical_practical.notes: Collapsing infrastructure and a degraded health system, with worsening hurricane exposure.

climate.notes: Worsening hurricane exposure and drought. (UN News)

healthcare.notes: The once-vaunted system degraded - severe medicine/doctor shortages and a doctor-export drain. (UN News)

infrastructure.notes: Collapsing - repeated nationwide grid failures in 2024-25, meeting only a fraction of demand. (Al Jazeera; CBS)

crime_safety.notes: Historically low street crime but rising amid the crisis. (independent analysis)

summary: A one-party communist state in deep economic collapse: a botched 2021 currency unification, default to creditors, an FX shortage, and a food-and-fuel crisis under the long US embargo (compounded by relisting as a state-sponsor of terrorism). Repression is severe with hundreds of 2021 protesters still jailed, the press is among the worst-treated in the Americas, and the country faces a demographic crisis - among the fastest-ageing, with over a million mostly working-age people having emigrated since 2021. The once-vaunted health system is degraded and the electricity grid suffers repeated nationwide failures. Clearly negative.
